metadata.name: 1D FVG & Major S&R Overlap Rejection
metadata.author: Quant_Lab_Alpha
metadata.rationale: Tests if the overlapping confluence of a 1D FVG and a Major S&R level creates an impenetrable block of institutional limit orders, causing an immediate reversal on the first touch.

long_trigger.comment: Price taps a Bullish 1D FVG that contains Major Support

short_trigger.comment: Price taps a Bearish 1D FVG that contains Major Resistance
